title: scutellaria goulimyi
intro: Scutellaria goulimyi, also known as the Greek skullcap, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and antioxidant defenses. Scutellaria goulimyi is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be found in some traditional herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
